tagline: Drift through liquid time in this ethereal journey.
liner: Welcome to the sound of moments dissolving like mist over a quiet river. This track weaves gritty noir aesthetics with dreamy liberation, creating an immersive rainforest-adjacent soundscape where every heartbeat moves slow beneath leaves above and water below. Soft whispers guide you through urgent tenderness before transcending into release. Here, time disappears without a trace as clouds melt into gray only to find the sun again. Breathe tonight while everything feels utterly alive, floating up higher through shimmering guitar textures and evolving ambient pads. It is an invitation to accept passing time with melancholy grace.
worldCaption: A rainforest-adjacent soundscape blending gritty noir shadows with dreamy liberation and liquid drum rhythms.

bios.lead: Whispers soft melodies into the mist.
bios.back: Echoes distant calls across the canopy.
bios.keys: Plays crisp notes in the gloom.
